title: The Skin I Live In
posterAlt: The Skin I Live In (2011) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A brilliant plastic surgeon creates a synthetic skin that withstands any kind of damage. His guinea pig: a mysterious and volatile woman who holds the key to his obsession.
synopsis: Released in 2011, The Skin I Live In is a drama, horror and mystery film from Spain. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
